# Max Horkheimer

*1895 – 1973 · German*

German philosopher and sociologist, director of the Frankfurt Institute for Social Research and founder of "critical theory": with Adorno, in Dialectic of Enlightenment, he shows how reason reduced to calculation and efficiency ("instrumental" reason) becomes a means of domination.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
